prestazioni: N54B30TO (3.0L twin-turbo inline-6) upgraded with a Pure Stage 2+ turbo kit featuring Garrett GT2867 gen2 turbos, custom 4-inch V-band downpipes, and a CSF high-flow aluminum radiator with integrated oil cooler for sustained 550whp on E60 ethanol blend

MCS 2-way adjustable remote-reservoir coilovers with 800lb/in front springs and 700lb/in rear springs, paired with Ohlins TTX40 adjustable dampers and spherical bearing top mounts for sub-300Hz chassis rigidity tuning

Motec M150 ECU with full flex-fuel mapping, dual Bosch 044 fuel pumps, and ID1000x injectors, calibrated for 30psi boost with a 200-cell ethanol-compatible fuel system and a custom 3.5-inch intercooler piping setup
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit with carbon fiber fenders, custom 50mm extended overfenders, and a 3D-printed ABS rear diffuser with integrated exhaust cutouts for dual 3.5-inch titanium tips

CSF carbon fiber hood with a 50mm vented scoop and integrated NACA ducts for direct intercooler airflow, paired with a custom M Performance-style front splitter with adjustable dive planes and a 30mm canard set
Recaro SPG XL seats in Alcantara with custom Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, bolted to a seam-welded and reinforced floorpan with a full MCS bolt-in roll cage (8-point, TIG-welded 4130 chromoly)
